docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF QI, RAYMOND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHELAN, NAOMI $3,163.57 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,163.57, DEFENDANT CAUSED COLLISION BY DRIVING TOO CLOSELY + TOO QUICKLY BY IMPROPERLY TRYING TO PASS ON THE RIGHT. (VEHICLE CODE 21703, 21705, 22350, 21754, 21755) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 7-20-18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SHELAN, NAOMI

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF QI, RAYMOND ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 SERVED JUN-07-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHELAN, NAOMI
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY QI, RAYMOND SHELAN, NAOMI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-19-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-19-2018 BY PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. 506 PLAINTIFF RAYMOND QI IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CANTONESE COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER CATHERINE HONG #191941. DEFENDANT NAOMI SHELAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SHELAN, NAOMI
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-19-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,200.00 FILED BY QI, RAYMOND AS TO DEFENDANT SHELAN, NAOMI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-16-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-19-2018 - JUDGMENT.
